title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: The company decided to postpone the launch until next month.
questions.secondSentence: The company decided (1) _________ until next month.

questions.firstSentence: If you don't start studying now, you will fail.
I find it very difficult to understand what he is saying.
questions.secondSentence: I am (1) _________ what he is saying.

questions.firstSentence: She was so angry that she couldn't speak.
questions.secondSentence: She was (1) _________ that she couldn't speak.

questions.firstSentence: The bridge was built twenty years ago.
It is not worth trying to fix that old car.
questions.secondSentence: There (1) _________ trying to fix that old car.
